name: Anomalous User Account Sign-In After Repeated Unsuccessful Attempts from Same IP Address Using Multiple Accounts
description: An anomalous sign-in of a user account after repeated unsuccessful attempts from the same IP address that attempted to access multiple user accounts may indicate a compromised account.

filterSets.name: Anomalous User Account Sign-In After Repeated Unsuccessful Attempts from Same IP Address Using Multiple Accounts

author: Clark Shao
